text:
Chronic Condition Warehouse 
CODEBOOK: Medicare Part D Pharmacy Characteristics │ April 2021 │ V 1.1 4 

DME_SRVC_IND 

LABEL: DME Services Indicator 

DESCRIPTION: This variable is an indicator as to whether or not the pharmacy offers some level of durable medical 
equipment (DME). 

SHORT NAME: — 

LONG NAME: DME_SRVC_IND 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 1 

SOURCE: NCDPD DataQ™ 

VALUES: Y = Yes, pharmacy offers DME 
N = No, pharmacy does not offer DME 
Null/missing = This information has not been
